note: 2026-05-29 window was partial (21 runs, mid-cycle). Several 05-28 issues did not recur in-window; status updated accordingly.

issues.title: NEW: setup_cache_memory_git.sh fails 'fatal: not in a git directory' after cache hit — both cache-memory-enabled workflows failed
issues.detail: Affected today: Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer (run 26662502294) and Copilot PR Prompt Pattern Analysis (run 26662652590). Both failed identically: the 'Setup cache-memory git repository' step (step 11/13) logs 'Cache hit detected: git repository found (restored from a previous run)' then '=== Cache directory: non-git files present after restore ===' (lists cache-hit-history.json etc.) then 'fatal: not in a git directory' + exit code 128. The 'Commit cache-memory changes' step (46/51) fails the same way. Root cause: after an Actions cache restore, the cache dir contains the data files but the .git directory is missing/corrupt, yet the script's cache-hit detection asserts a git repo was found and runs git commands without re-initializing. For Chaos the agent never ran (turns=0) — the setup-step failure aborted before the agent executed. FIX: setup_cache_memory_git.sh must verify .git is a valid repo after restore (e.g. `git rev-parse --git-dir`) and re-`git init` if the restored dir has files but is not a git repo, instead of trusting the cache-hit flag.

issues.title: Smoke Claude: 2 missing/broken tools — mcpscripts-gh passthrough absent + serena symbol tools crash (Go LSP EOF)
issues.detail: Run 26662945808 (Smoke Claude SUCCEEDED overall). Two capability gaps surfaced: (1) mcpscripts CLI exposes no `gh` passthrough tool (only github_pr_query/issue/discussion, go, make) — test #2 worked around it with github_pr_query; (2) serena activate_project succeeded but all symbol tools (find_symbol, get_symbols_overview) return 'MCP error 0 EOF' — the Go LSP backend crashes on first query. Item (2) is a recurring serena/Go-LSP reliability concern worth a dedicated fix; item (1) may be an expected limitation (the smoke test self-corrected). Neither failed the run but both reduce Smoke Claude's coverage.

issues.title: Smoke Codex: web-fetch MCP tool not available in environment
issues.detail: Run 26662945780 (Smoke Codex SUCCEEDED overall). The agent reported the required web-fetch MCP tool is not available. Either the smoke test should not exercise web-fetch in this environment, or web-fetch should be provisioned. Low severity (run passed).

issues.title: RESOLVED after 9 days: Changeset Generator moved to gpt-5.4 and SUCCEEDED
issues.detail: The 9-day-stuck alpha-routing failure is fixed. Changeset Generator (run 26662945784) now reads model: gpt-5.4 in aw_info.json and completed successfully (5.9m, codex engine). The one-line frontmatter edit recommended for 9 days was applied. Smoke Copilot also SUCCEEDED today (run 26662945830). Marking resolved; will confirm no recurrence over next 2 cycles.

issues.title: WATCH: target=* safe-output failures did NOT recur in 05-29 window
issues.detail: On 05-28 this affected add_comment (Contribution Check), create_pull_request_review_comment (Smoke Claude), set_issue_field (Smoke Codex). In the 05-29 window Contribution Check, Smoke Claude, and Smoke Codex all SUCCEEDED — no target=* failures observed. Note the 05-29 window is partial, so absence is not proof of fix. The MCP-boundary validation recommendation remains valuable as a durable guard. Retained in watch state.

issues.title: REVERSED: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer cost dropped $11.33 -> $3.07 (3.1M tokens)
issues.detail: Run 26662957238 today cost $3.07 on 3.13M tokens / 58 turns — a sharp drop from the 05-28 high of $11.33 (54.5M eff_tok). The 3-day escalating trend ($6.05 -> $9.90 -> $11.33) has reversed. Either the prompt-growth source was trimmed or this is downward variance. Marking resolved-for-now; keep watching for re-escalation.

issues.title: WATCH: Avenger did not run in the 05-29 window — max-turns fix status unknown
issues.detail: No Avenger runs appear in the 21-run 05-29 window, so the isMaxTurnsExit=true (--max-turns 25) issue could not be re-evaluated today. The recommendation to raise max-turns to ~50 in .github/workflows/avenger.md remains open and unverified. Re-check next cycle when Avenger runs.

issues.title: WATCH: 'all retries exhausted no category' did NOT recur in 05-29 window
issues.detail: On 05-28 this hit Smoke Copilot, PR Sous Chef x2, Auto-Triage (3 of 4 gpt-5-mini). In the 05-29 window Smoke Copilot SUCCEEDED; PR Sous Chef was still in_progress (no failure captured); Auto-Triage did not run in-window. No instances of the signature today. Partial window — keep the harness error-classification recommendation open and re-check.

issues.title: Firewall: only notable block pressure today is Smoke Antigravity 10/12 (83%, by-design smoke)
issues.detail: The 05-29 window's firewall hotspot is Smoke Antigravity (10 blocked of 12 total) — expected for that engine's smoke test (antigravity-unleash.goog and Playwright Azure-CDN domains). No broad cross-workflow block spike in this window. Retained for trend tracking.

issues.title: Stable: 11 copilot runs in window, 0 ENOENT / 0 anthropic-beta errors
issues.detail: Copilot CLI remains stable for the original ENOENT/anthropic-beta failure modes across 11 copilot runs in the 05-29 window. 1.0.52 still recommended as minimum.
